holdings.infoBox: CORO is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are iShares MSCI Japan ETF stock at 18.43%, iShares MSCI Canada ETF at 12.85%, iShares MSCI United Kingdom ETF at 10.90%, iShares MSCI South Korea ETF at 9.62%, and iShares MSCI Spain ETF at 5.75%.

overview.description: The iShares International Country Rotation Active ETF (CORO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds, seeking long-term capital appreciation through investments in non-US companies. The fund targets nations with favorable economic outlooks by employing a country rotation strategy. CORO was launched on Dec 3, 2024 and is issued by BlackRock.
